{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323024128725A3E0F6E7505511904"}"},"total":1322},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7487624125579445054","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书是我这些年看下来最优秀的神豪文了，嘴角没下来过。
开头没有那种男主头顶绿油油的剧情，男主的刻画并没有很npc，而是有自己的特点，也不是什么种马。对女主的刻画很到位，因为感情线并没有很着急，所以有很多笔墨用于深化女主的形象，即使套用模板也很立体，并不是那种npc。
剧情也没有很多打脸装逼的剧情，没有强行通过打脸来提升爽感，而是更多地去写感情线，写一些我们爱看的剧情，不知不觉地爽地飞起来，节奏也把握地很舒适，爱看日常的很推荐。
缺点是细节呢！作者我的细节呢[奸笑][奸笑][奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743351908,"group_id":"7474771689016921113","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"地球是圆的，思念总会让我们再次相见","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9D+zGxeycinFPWGEQ/j6tsko0MHheJtIkvkT2LMbxxT","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3457042788134a5a95771e5c98edde76~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788387&x-signature=uRAga5%2Fh%2F2XPLLv9xxRd7Xp%2BhfU%3D","user_id":"1328628367625469","user_name":"思念如雨下"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1328628367625469","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7474771689016921113","book_info":{"abstract":"【校园神豪】【爽文】【多女主】【恋爱日常】

【您在烧烤摊消费288元，返现+2880元】
【购买游戏皮肤共花费14396元，触发特殊奖励：帕拉梅拉！】
香车、豪宅、股份、财团……
大学生活就是要随心所欲，为所欲为！
……

苏白大手一挥：你的未来，我包了！
